Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip Steven Horne, 552-2740, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Rodel E. Rodis, 334-7800, appearing for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RENIERO LEYSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied, 10 days to answer. Given Clerk's August 18, 2006 Certificate of Service, amended complaint was timely pursuant to CCP 1013(a), and it was sufficiently responsive to order to survive this Motion to Strike. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/AP) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Philip Steven Horne for plaintiff and moving party: Aida P.
Rodel E. Rodis for defendant and opposing party: Reniero Leyson

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Aida P's motion to compel the deposition of defendant is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Counsel for defendant is ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition is to be completed on or before October 26, 2006. The Court finds that defendant failed to appear for deposition. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $722 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
